query:
SELECT p.id AS productId, p.poNumber, p.batchNo, p.serialNumber, p.imei, p.stationCode, p.productStatus, p.sheetRowNumber, p.archivedAt
FROM products p
WHERE p.batchNo IN ('500025007','500025004','500024968','500025035','500025029')
ORDER BY p.batchNo;

SELECT se.id AS stationEventId, se.productId, p.batchNo, se.stationCode, se.operatorUserId, u.name AS operatorName, se.stationEventType, se.countForProductivity, se.businessDate, se.createdAt
FROM station_events se
JOIN products p ON p.id = se.productId
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = se.operatorUserId
WHERE p.batchNo IN ('500025007','500025004','500024968','500025035','500025029')
  AND se.stationEventType = 'complete'
ORDER BY p.batchNo, se.stationCode, se.id;

SELECT psd.id AS detailId, psd.stationEventId, psd.productId, p.batchNo, psd.stationCode, psd.userId, u.name AS userName, psd.earnedPoints, psd.businessDate
FROM productivity_score_details psd
JOIN products p ON p.id = psd.productId
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = psd.userId
WHERE p.batchNo IN ('500025007','500025004','500024968','500025035','500025029')
ORDER BY p.batchNo, psd.stationCode, psd.id;

SELECT batchNo, COUNT(*) AS activeCount
FROM products
WHERE archivedAt IS NULL AND batchNo IS NOT NULL AND batchNo <> ''
GROUP BY batchNo
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY activeCount DESC, batchNo
LIMIT 20;

FROM productivity_score_details psd
